code: export class UserLiveFeedParser{constructor(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:''};}flush(){this._data={username:'',figure:'',message:''};return true;}parse(wrapper){try{console.log('[LIVE FEED] First String:',wrapper.readString());console.log('[LIVE FEED] Second String:',wrapper.readString());console.log('[LIVE FEED] Third String:',wrapper.readString());}catch(e){console.error('[LIVE FEED] Error reading strings from wrapper:',e);}return true;}get data(){return this._data;}}
